basics.name: Kartik Patel
basics.title: MERN Stack Developer - Frontend Developer - Backend Developer - Undergraduate - @Institute of Advanced Research - BAPS Volunteer
basics.summary: Aspiring Web Developer skilled in MERN Stack (React.js, Node.js, MongoDB, Express.js) with hands-on experience building responsive, user-focused applications. Passionate about clean code, creative UI, and continuous learning. Recently completed an internship at ZIDIO Development, contributing to a superhero-themed e-commerce platform.

bullets: Engineered scalable e-commerce features using React.js, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
Implemented JWT-based authentication to secure user login and registration workflows.
Developed interactive product listings with filters by category and subcategory.
Integrated Stripe and QR-based payment systems, improving transaction efficiency by 40%.
Developed admin dashboards to manage products, orders, users, coupons enhancing business control.
Collaborated in an Agile team using Git for version control

achievements.title: Transaction Efficiency
achievements.context: Integrated Stripe and QR-based payment systems, improving transaction efficiency by 40%.

projects.name: Superhero E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce platform with dynamic filtering, buy a products, secure JWT authentication, and comprehensive admin dashboard.

projects.name: Car Rental System
projects.description: A web application for renting cars to going any place.

projects.name: Chatrise - Social Media Web Application
projects.description: A Chatrise web application created to connect with friends to create post, chat with friends.
